sections.label: Chorus
lines: Hi ning! Hi ning! Pasian aw nong huh hi,
Nang aa bek hong hi ning,
tatkhiatna’ng, Na si manpha luang hi,
Nang aa bek hong hi ning.

sections.label: Verse 1
lines: Tu-in Topa, Nang kong sang nuamta hi,

sections.label: Verse 2
lines: Ka thanemna, lam pial ding ka launa,

sections.label: Verse 3
lines: Na hehpihna tu’n hong pia in, Topa,

sections.label: Verse 4
lines: Leitung na om lai-a hong zuante in,
nuam hi” ci-a Na dawnna in,
